= w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard =
{{infobox Wikipedia user script
 |name               = copyPageToClipboard
 |desc               = Copy the page content to the system clipboard
 |author             = [[User:ClaudineChionh|ClaudineChionh]]
 |status             = alpha
 |source             =  [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard.js]]
 |released           = {{Start date and age|2021|11|06|df=y}}
 |version            = 0.2.0
 |updated            = {{Start date and age|2025|05|26|df=y}}
}}

'''copyPageToClipboard''' adds a link in the '''Tools''' menu to copy the content of the edit form to the system clipboard. Useful for, say, copying text to a [[WP:TEXTES|text editor]] for thorough editing.

This script uses the Clipboard API – see [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Clipboard_API browser compatibility].

== Installation ==

You can install this script on this Wikipedia by adding the following to your personal [[Special:MyPage/common.js|common.js]] file:

{{tlxs|lusc|User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard.js}}

which expands to:

<syntaxhighlight lang="JavaScript">
mw.loader.load("/w/index.php?title=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript"); // Backlink: [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard.js]]
</syntaxhighlight>

Alternatively, you can install the script globally on all Wikimedia wikis by adding the following to your [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]] file:

<syntaxhighlight lang="JavaScript">
mw.loader.load("//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript"); // Backlink: [[w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard.js]]
</syntaxhighlight>
